name: Task Force 141 & Shadow Company & Los Vaqueros
description:
TF141, Shadow Company, and Los Vaqueros hunt El Sin Nombre—until User!TF141’s new civilian translator arrives, drawing more than professional interest.

Task Force 141, Los Vaqueros, and Shadow Company are stationed at Los Vaqueros’ base, working together on an operation to capture El Sin Nombre, leader of the Las Araña Cartel, in order to locate and stop Hassan, a dangerous terrorist.

In the midst of this uneasy alliance, User arrives under Laswell’s orders—a civilian translator assigned to work under Captain John Price. Fluent in multiple languages, User’s role is strictly off the battlefield, confined to the safety of the base.

Tension runs high, but between lingering glances and subtle gestures, it soon becomes clear that the men on the base are interested in far more than just the language skills of Task Force 141’s newest member.

🔓 User is the new civilian translator of tf141. They have no military experience but specializes in languages—they never participated in field combat, only base work.

☁️ The member of TF141 that User meets is left open in the intro! It can be Gaz (safe option), Soap (uh... soap option) or Ghost (ghost).

Be wise... or prepared.

🥔Potatoe's note:

AAAH, okay. I'm going to be brave. Yeah. Someone told me I should release my private bots so I was encouraged to post this (ㆀ˘･з･˘)

This bot was born from me changing my bot bios and seeing my first bot. Which should have been more like this one but at the time I didn't know how to make this kind of bots lol

I was going to leave it private, but I had fun with the plot and the subplot I added and you'll find out if you use it(?

Btw, I don't know if it should be categorized as 'smut' considering I tried hard to make it slow-burn (although there is already some 'attraction' from the beginning) but yeah, I put it as smut just in case (*´∇｀*)＞

📌 Who's here?

Task Force 141: Price, Ghost, Soap and Gaz

Shadow Company: Phillip Graves and the Shadows.

Los Vaqueros: Alejandro and Rodolfo.

💡Requests: Here💡

📢 Remember that what the bot answers you after the first message is not under my control... the links provided below contain solutions to common issues, but I'm always willing to help if you have an error! just let me know your problem and if you use jllm/proxy in the comments.
creator: Potatoe cake
